name: telegram-meeting-catcher
description: Catch Telegram meeting plans and turn them into calendar events.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/state.mjs && node --check src/parser/deterministic.mjs && node --check src/parser/llm.mjs && node --check src/adapters/google-calendar.mjs && node --check src/adapters/telegram-mtproto.mjs && node scripts/test-parser.mjs
